$description: Machine-legible grid contract. Structural constants (column count) are foundation's own law; every dimensional value references a token. Consumed by the builder to set Elementor container/column defaults and by tests to verify layouts stay on-grid.

gutter.$description: Space between columns. Scales up with the viewport.

margin.$description: Outer page inset (the gap between content and the viewport edge).

full.purpose: Full-bleed section shell; inner content still capped.
